task_description: Fix multiple UX bugs (onboarding flash, priority button layout, profile picture sync, voice mode, service reconnection) and create a Google Slides MCP server to replace the direct API approach, plus make the AI orchestrator aware of integration status

verification.summary: Frontend lint passes with no errors. Frontend tests: 2 pre-existing failures on main branch (Sidebar.test.tsx and ChatExperience.test.tsx reference outdated UI patterns). All backend Python files compile successfully. Review findings addressed (postMessage origin restriction, middleware cookie optimization).
